text.title: Substack-to-Product Funnel Decision Tree
text.summary: Run-or-skip gate based on preconditions, then a second-level question routing to a rule-id conclusion. Minimum-form tree for a methodology of this shape.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the publication on Substack AND ≥500 free subs (or credible 8-week path)?

branch.question: Is the paid tier benefit concrete AND ≥3 recommendation partners agreed?

branch.conclusion: Ship spec: paid tier + recommendation network + monthly cross-post + email 4 hard CTA.
Skip ship; define concrete paid-tier benefit + secure ≥3 partners first.
Skip this methodology. Substack-specific mechanics need Substack hosting + a sub base.

text.example: platform=substack subs=720 benefit=monthly-deep-dive partners=3 → ship spec per r2.
